case_title: PATELCO CREDIT UNION VS LUNA ANTONIO

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LUNA ANTONIO
